title: cyphia rupestris
intro: Cyphia rupestris, also known as the rocky cyphia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyphia rupestris include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. It is typically prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
